name: the routing table binds json to a formatter and typescript to several linters
command: R="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/kind-to-tool-routing.yaml"; grep -A4 '^  json:' "$R" | grep -q 'tool: prettier' && grep -A8 '^  typescript:' "$R" | grep -q 'tool: eslint' && grep -A8 '^  typescript:' "$R" | grep -q 'tool: semgrep' && echo routing-expanded-across-axes 1>&2
